subcategory.title: Camping
subcategory.description: Prepare for your next camping trip and find your perfect offer here. Camping in Switzerland is more popular than ever. More and more people looking for peace and quiet are setting off in their camper, caravan or tent and spending relaxing or eventful days at one of the almost 400 campsites in Switzerland. You can either buy or rent the camping equipment yourself. Numerous stores offer all kinds of equipment you need for your camping trip

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
